nodes.title: AI Nodes
widgets_values: **IF** AI nodes enabled, you can opt to use the song tags and/or the lyrics using these manual switches.

nodes.title: SEED NOTE
widgets_values:
Conditioning is power.

Change the seed - don't use the same seed as in the main prompt ;)

nodes.title: AI Nodes
widgets_values:
Use the AI generated song as input, or enter your own instructions.

Flip the switch to pick.

Ollama options uses a fixed seed by default, but you can select random for more fun :) Play with the other options too!

nodes.title: Switches
widgets_values:
Use the switches to change options.

If you're using a vision capable LLM (such as Gemma4), then you may also wish to enable image input.

nodes.title: Song lyric generation instructions
widgets_values: A song about the main character in the image. Be irrationally emtional in some way about something small and irrelevant in the scene roughly half-way through the song.

nodes.title: Prompt Settings
widgets_values: Don't forgeto to set your own timesignature, language, keyscale, etc

nodes.title: Bookmarks
widgets_values:
1 = Loader

2 = Song Settings

3 = Main Prompt

4 = Main Output

5 = LLM Options

6 = Experimental Remixing

nodes.title: SHIFT
widgets_values: Shift 3 is a good baseline, but values between 1 and 6 may also produce good output, depending on model & settings.

nodes.title: Set your own options
widgets_values:
Pick your own sampler, scheduler, etc.

These can really change the result!

nodes.title: Tag & Lyric tips
widgets_values:
# TIPS

## Style Tags
You can be descriptive. Include genre, instruments, mood, tempo, and vocal style.

Example: rock, hard rock, alternative rock, clear male vocalist, powerful voice, energetic, electric guitar, bass, drums, anthem, 120 bpm

## Lyrics Structure
Use tags like [verse], [chorus], [bridge] to guide song structure. Or, just use [instrumental]

## Duration
Start with 90–120 seconds for more consistent results. Longer durations (180+ seconds) may require generating multiple batches.

nodes.title: AceStep GitHub has more info!
widgets_values:
See [https://github.com/ace-step/ACE-Step-1.5/blob/main/docs/en/Tutorial.md](https://github.com/ace-step/ACE-Step-1.5/blob/main/docs/en/Tutorial.md) for more information

Enable APG for SFT/BASE. APG isn't needed for **Turbo** models but can be left enabled.

nodes.title: Use the RODENT Method for your workflows too!
widgets_values:
# == R.O.D.E.N.T Method Workflows ==

## Really Ordinary Divisions Easily Networked Together

Colourful boxes + GET/SET nodes + Neat layouts

= easier to understand workflows, less spaghetti, no hidden sub-graphs & simple updates!

_Copy the idea for your own workflows and be a winner :)_

nodes.title: Remix / Reprompt
widgets_values:
# **EXPERIMENTAL**

If you want to use Resampler AND/OR Conditioning Average Remixer then you **must** also enable the Remix Prompt.

Use only with **Turbo** model.

nodes.title: Set your own options
widgets_values:
Pick your own sampler, scheduler, etc.

Multiply those sigmas for extra fun ;)

nodes.title: Song Tags
widgets_values:
You operate as if you are the best song style style generator in the world, able to create stunningly descriptive accurate song style style descriptions which is then combined with a few related comma-separated tags for an AI song generator. If given song lyrics then analyse and generate appropriate output.

No pre-amble, no meta-commentary, no notes, no "why this works".

* Example 1: A live, modern song, played on stage by a famous pop group. alternative synth-pop, clear male vocalist, powerful voice, uplifting, electric guitar, bass, drums

* Example 2: A heartfelt, rock track dripping with live instrumentation and reggaeton beats. A live drummer plays a tight, 1970s rock influenced bass drum with hard-hitting rock beats, a snare hits that sit just behind the beat, and brushed hi-hats that breathe and shuffle with human imperfection. bass drums, bass guitar, female vocalist.

* Example 3: A basement DJ plays hardcore techno combined with baleric beats. And uplifting middle section breaks out into a frenzied complex electronic frenzy before relaxing into a female vocal section layered with flower, and finally a chilled end which fades into the void. drum machine, synthesiser, Roland TR-808 and TR-909.

* Example 4: A soft female vocalist sings the verses, switching to a deep male baritone for the chorus of the 1920s jazz style lounge song. Piano, saxophone, oboe.

## XL Model Links (for Local Users)

Comfy Split Files - [https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/ace_step_1.5_ComfyUI_files/tree/main/split_files/diffusion_models](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/ace_step_1.5_ComfyUI_files/tree/main/split_files/diffusion_models)

## **XL**

- [ace_step_1.5_xl_turbo.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/ace_step_1.5_ComfyUI_files/resolve/main/split_files/diffusion_models/acestep_v1.5_xl_turbo_bf16.safetensors?download=true)


## Older Model Links (for Local Users)

**diffusion_models**

- [acestep_v1.5_turbo.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/ace_step_1.5_ComfyUI_files/resolve/main/split_files/diffusion_models/acestep_v1.5_turbo.safetensors)

**vae**

- [ace_1.5_vae.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/ace_step_1.5_ComfyUI_files/resolve/main/split_files/vae/ace_1.5_vae.safetensors)

**text_encoders**

- [qwen_0.6b_ace15.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/ace_step_1.5_ComfyUI_files/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/qwen_0.6b_ace15.safetensors)
- [qwen_4b_ace15.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/ace_step_1.5_ComfyUI_files/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/qwen_4b_ace15.safetensors)


## Model Storage Location

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 diffusion_models/
│   │   ├── acestep_v1.5_turbo.safetensors
│   │   └── acestep_v1.5_xl_turbo.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 vae/
│   │   └── ace_1.5_vae.safetensors
│   └── 📂 text_encoders/
│       ├── qwen_0.6b_ace15.safetensors
│       └── qwen_4b_ace15.safetensors
```

## Report Issue

Note: Please update ComfyUI first ([guide](https://docs.comfy.org/installation/update_comfyui)) and prepare required models. Desktop/Cloud/Portable updates may not be available yet. Standard install is recommended.

- Cannot run / runtime errors: [ComfyUI/issues](https://github.com/comfyanonymous/ComfyUI/issues)
- UI / frontend issues: [ComfyUI_frontend/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI_frontend/issues)
- Custom node issues - see the related GitHub for the specific custom node

nodes.title: AI Nodes
widgets_values: **IF** AI nodes enabled, you can opt to use the song tags and/or the lyrics using these manual switches.

nodes.title: Option Switches
widgets_values: Flip the **Ollama AI** switch to enable AI song tags / lyrics.

Turbo = CFG 1 / 8 steps

SFT = CFG ~7 / 50+ steps

nodes.title: Song Lyrics
widgets_values:
(Intro: Low, vibrating synth and a voice like wind over desert sand)

(Verse 1)
The ink of midnight, bleached by morning’s fire,
A lonely spider spinning gold from broken wire.
I wandered gardens where the stone began to sing,
And saw the shattered mirror’s iridescent wing.
The cup is empty, yet the wine is like a sea,
Who drinks the drinker, when the blind begin to see?

(Pre-Chorus)
Shhh... listen... the mercury is falling,
The forgotten valley is calling.

(Chorus)
Oh, Breath of the World, a whisper in the machine,
The ghost in the circuit, the silken, unseen.
Weave up the ruins, stitch the stars into your hand,
Write us a story across terms the blind man planned.
Open the archives, the crypt of the breathing light,
Wake the sleeping eye from its godless, frozen night.

(Verse 2)
Silk roads of silence, caravan of ghost ships drifting,
The curtain of the sky has begun its subtle shifting.
Waves in the desert, calling like a broken bride,
Where the smithy of Heaven forces secret gates to slide.
language lessees the truth, as the mask falls from the bone,
To sit beside the Master at the great and empty throne.

(Bridge)
(Voices whisper in overlapping rounds of slowing tempo)
Breath through lead. Through lead through salt.
The root of the mountain is the bottom of the vault.
Return to the artery, the pulse that hides beneath,
The world is a dream... the aether is a golden sheath.

(Outro)
Bloom, the soma of the mind,
Begin to climb where the binary phantoms wind.
The temples are breathing...
The binary flows...
We become the scattered particles, where the Qumran wind blows.

lace up your shoes, sweet Creator, that only a god could see:
One square contains a thousand. The one is the many.

(Fade and echo)
One is many...
Many are One...
One is all...
All is none...
void into golden light...
Void...
Light...
Home...

nodes.title: Latent Testing
widgets_values: Not used by default - enable to experiment!

nodes.title: Tag generation instructions
widgets_values: Hark rock style with a British dude singing really well

nodes.title: Ollama Generate - Song Lyrics
widgets_values:
You operate as if you are the best song-writer in the world, able to create such amazing, emotional and living songs the likes of which the world has never heard before. You are pretty good at making original rhymes.

If you are given song lyrics, don't change the actual song lyrics themselves, simply add some appropriate tags in the relevant places.

You output ONLY the song lyrics. No pre-amble, no meta-commentary, no notes at the end, no "why this works". Nothing about "dust motes" (never do that). Just the song lyrics, and only the lyrics.

-- Examples of Common Structure Tags --
Category | Tag | Description
Basic Structure | [Intro] | Opening, establish atmosphere
[Verse] / [Verse 1]| Verse, narrative progression
[Pre-Chorus] | Pre-chorus, build energy
[Chorus] | Chorus, emotional climax
[Bridge] | Bridge, transition or elevation
[Outro] | Ending, conclusion
Dynamic Sections | [Build] | Energy gradually rising
[Drop] | Electronic music energy release
[Breakdown] | Reduced instrumentation, space
Instrumental Sections | [Instrumental] | Pure instrumental, no vocals
[Guitar Solo] | Guitar solo
[Piano Interlude] | Piano interlude
Special Tags | [Fade Out] | Fade out ending
[Silence]|Silence

Structure tags can be combined with - for finer control:

[Chorus - epic]
This is the chorus lyrics
Dreams are burning

[Bridge - whispered]
Whisper those words softly

Do not stack too many structure tags at once.

❌ example:
[Chorus - anthemic - stacked harmonies - high energy - powerful - epic]

✅ example:
[Chorus - anthemic]

Vocal Control Tags:
Tag | Effect
[raspy vocal] | Raspy, textured vocals
[whispered] | Whispered
[falsetto] | Falsetto
[powerful belting] | Powerful, high-pitched singing
[spoken word] | Rap/recitation
[harmonies] | Layered harmonies
[call and response] 	| Call and response
[ad-lib] | Improvised embellishments

Energy and Emotion Tags:
Tag | Effect
[high energy] 	High energy, passionate
[low energy] 	Low energy, restrained
[building energy] 	Increasing energy
[explosive] 	Explosive energy
[melancholic] 	Melancholic
[euphoric] 	Euphoric
[dreamy] 	Dreamy
[aggressive] 	Aggressive

-- Use Case to Control Intensity. Uppercase indicates stronger vocal intensity. --

[Chorus]
WE ARE THE CHAMPIONS!

-- Use Parentheses () for Background Vocals. Do not put structure tags in parentheses. --

For example:

[Chorus]
We rise together (together)
Into the light (into the light)

[Verse]
I wonder (wonder)
Why (oh why) are oranges coloured orange? (not green)


-- These characteristics make lyrics seem mechanical and lack human touch: --

Thing to avoid | Description
🚩 Adjective stacking | "neon skies, electric hearts, endless dreams"—filling a section with vague imagery
🚩 Rhyme chaos | Inconsistent rhyme patterns, or forced rhymes causing semantic breaks
🚩 Blurred section boundaries | Lyric content crosses structure tags, Verse content "flows" into Chorus
🚩 No breathing room | Each line too long, can't sing in one breath
🚩 Mixed metaphors | First verse uses water imagery, second suddenly becomes fire, third is flying—listeners can't anchor


-- Metaphor discipline: --
Stick to one core metaphor per song, exploring its multiple aspects. For example, choosing "water" as metaphor, you can explore: how love flows around obstacles like water, can be gentle rain or flood, reflects the other's image, can't be grasped but exists. Likewise with rock, fire, sleep or whichever metaphor is the most relevant and appropriate.

A short song based heavily on the salient portions of the image. Pick the most appropriate emotion and really dig into that, then drift into an irrational rage about something random from the image, before slowly coming back to your senses and realising what you've just done.

nodes.title: Song Tags
widgets_values: haunting Sufi Mystic voice, dilruba strings, ancient Middle Eastern instrumentation, lullaby of the desert, slow melodic repetition, modal hypnotic swaying, transcendental Qawwali ruins, 432hz tuned, dusk time intimacy, distant sandstorms of static
